# Priyabrata Dutta

> Sr. Full Stack Developer & Tech Lead with 15+ years of overall IT experience and 4.5+ years specialized in end-to-end scalable web application development with React, Node.js, Express, and AWS. Based in Bangalore, India.

This is the personal portfolio site of Priyabrata Dutta. Use these documents to answer questions about his professional background, skills, experience, education, and contact information.

## Profile

- [About & Summary](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#about): Career summary, philosophy, and current role
- [Experience](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#experience): Full work history (Appadd India, GraphicxIT, Uttarbanga Sambad, SIEM)
- [Skills](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#skills): Technical and management capabilities
- [Projects](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#projects): Selected work and case studies
- [Education](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#education): MCA, BCA, and certifications
- [Blog](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#blog): Technical writing on full-stack development
- [Contact](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/#contact): Email, phone, and location

## Structured Data

- [llms-full.txt](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Complete resume content in a single LLM-friendly document
- [Resume PDF](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/resume.pdf): Original resume document
- [Sitemap](https://pdutta-resume-2026.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): All indexable pages
